source: FOLK_MAGIC_SPELLS in index.html — reconciled with Mythras Core + AiG + Cult One-Pagers
policy: Only spells attested from Mythras Core (p.122-130), AiG culture lists, or cult folk magic data are included in the general picker. Cult-specific spells remain accessible via CULTS_DATA.folkMagic arrays.

removed_unattested.reason: Not found in Mythras Core, AiG culture lists, or any cult folkMagic array. No source could be identified.

retained_from_non_core_sources.name: Find Game

retained_from_non_core_sources.name: Detect Magic

retained_from_non_core_sources.name: Endurance
retained_from_non_core_sources.source: Notes from Pavis Cult One-Pagers (Polaris cult folk magic)

in_reference_not_in_general_picker.reason: These Mythras Core spells are not in the general picker but ARE available to characters through cult-specific folk magic (CULTS_DATA.folkMagic). They are primarily cult-access spells in a Gloranthan context (e.g., Frostbite for Himile/Valind, Curse for Asrelia/Ty Kora Tek). Characters in those cults can still access them.

vasana_rqg_spirit_magic_mapping.policy: Under strict ADR-0015 chargen baseline, RQG initiate spirit magic is not automatically ported as active cult magic. Mythras Folk Magic entries below are reconciliation notes for GM advancement/conversion.

spells.picker_note: Not in general picker; available only through specific cult/GM access.
spells.fixture_status_note: Not in Vasana folkMagicSpells; future advancement or GM conversion required.
